content-type.goal: Establish how the content is to be used in the creation of information assets and documentation.

contentTypeCategory.context: Supporting documentation used to enable the development of features and the creation of related materials, such as instructions.
contentTypeCategory.instruction: Guideline on how to develop a given subject or subject setup.
contentTypeCategory.insight: Brainstorming about ideas and improvement opportunities to be considered in the projet.

subject.goal: Specify the intended use of the content.

subjectCategory.overview: understand and mapping of the project or problem
subjectCategory.claude-code: develop or update claude code features or settings
subjectCategory.datamodel: develop or update workflows and entity relationship data models
subjectCategory.prototype: Define the documentation for prototyping solutions based on Jake Knapp Srpint book
subjectCategory.method: Establish the approach for addressing the challenges identified in the project
subjectCategory.concept: The idea that drives the inovation or solution
subjectCategory.project: develop the informations and documentation needed to develop the solution for the problem raised.
